# from: jls8

- id: ControlFlowAsGraph
  how: graph of method involving try block with multiple statements
---
The whole body of a `try` block executes, then, at the end of the `try` block, Java checks whether an exception happened, and executes the corresponding `catch` block if needed.

frontmatter.shortDescription: Exceptions get thrown at the end of the try block
